name: Drifting Cargo Crate
description: A sealed crate bobs beside the ship.

name: Lost Sailor
description: A stranded sailor waves from a broken plank.

name: Minor Storm
description: Dark clouds roll in and rough waves batter the hull.

name: Pirate Skiff
description: A small pirate skiff cuts across your route.

name: Marine Inspection
description: A Marine patrol signals your ship to slow down.

name: Sea King Shadow
description: A massive shadow passes beneath your ship. The crew holds its breath.

name: Calm Current
description: A friendly current carries your ship forward.
